assets.source_name: Original premium automotive infotainment startup sound for Kaiser. Exactly 1.0 second. Restrained three-part glass-digital activation, warm satin midrange, subtle spatial width, immediate clean onset, short dry tail. Calm and professional inside a vehicle cabin. No bass hit, no gong, no alarm, no phone notification, no video game, no copied automotive melody, no voice, no music.
assets.edits: trimmed leading silence 0.000s; capped duration; equal-power fades; RMS normalized; peak limited to -1.5 dBFS

assets.source_name: Single original premium automotive touchscreen confirmation click for Kaiser. No beep, no keyboard click, no phone sound, no game UI, no alarm, no voice, no music, no copied car-brand sound.
